text:
Also sent to tne cne
Betsy Button Feb 23rd at 13:19
Because we've had a few more friends join the channel,
wanted to reiterate how to get Claude Code access for
testing & development if you don't already have it:
1. Request access to 10gen-aws-bedrock-models Okt
group from MANA
2. Ping @John Ziegler and mention you're working on
shipping Agent Skills for MongoDB's Claude Code
plugin (this will fast-track your approval given that
there's currently a long waitlist
3. Once you have access, you'll get automatically
enrolled in a Docebo course for coding with Al. You
need to take this before the Bedrock models will
work for you (if you don't, you'll get stuck in an AW
auth loop)
4. Run this script to set up your claude code config
with Bedrock https://github.com/10gen/claude-
code-setup
些2
